languages.text: "Конечно же, Ваша Светлость. Династии требуется доход для поддержания протектората. Было бы глупо упускать такую возможность".

traits.locale_text: "Конечно же, Ваша Светлость. Династии требуется доход для поддержания протектората. Было бы глупо упускать такую возможность".

languages.text: "Of course, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. The dynasty needs income to maintain the protectorate. It would be foolish to pass up such an opportunity."
languages.original_text: "Конечно же, Ваша Светлость. Династии требуется доход для поддержания протектората. Было бы глупо упускать такую возможность".

traits.locale_text: "Of course, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. The dynasty needs income to maintain the protectorate. It would be foolish to pass up such an opportunity."
"Of course, Lord Captain. The dynasty needs income to maintain the protectorate. It would be foolish to pass up such an opportunity."
"Of course, Lord Captain. The dynasty needs income to maintain the protectorate. It would be foolish to pass up such an opportunity."
"Of course, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. The dynasty needs income to maintain the protectorate. It would be foolish to pass up such an opportunity."

languages.text: 「もちろん、キャプテン様。王朝は保護領を維持するために収入が必要です。このような機会を逃すのは愚かです」
languages.original_text: "Of course, Lord Captain. The dynasty needs income to maintain the protectorate. It would be foolish to pass up such an opportunity."

traits.locale_text: 「もちろん、キャプテン様。王朝は保護領を維持するために収入が必要です。このような機会を逃すのは愚かです。」

languages.text: «Por supuesto, mi{mf|lord|lady}. La dinastía necesita ingresos para mantener el protectorado. Sería una necedad dejar pasar esta oportunidad».
languages.original_text: "Of course, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. The dynasty needs income to maintain the protectorate. It would be foolish to pass up such an opportunity."

traits.locale_text: «Por supuesto, mi{mf|lord|lady}. La dinastía necesita ingresos para mantener el protectorado. Sería una necedad dejar pasar esta oportunidad».
«Por supuesto, Lord Capitán. La dinastía necesita ingresos para mantener el protectorado. Sería una necedad dejar pasar esta oportunidad».

languages.text: “当然，大人。王朝需要收入来维持属地，错过这样的机会实属不智。”
languages.original_text: "Of course, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. The dynasty needs income to maintain the protectorate. It would be foolish to pass up such an opportunity."

traits.locale_text: “当然，舰长大人。王朝需要收入来维持属地，错过这样的机会实属不智。”

languages.text: "Natürlich, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}. Die Dynastie braucht Einkünfte für den Erhalt des Protektorats. Es wäre dumm, sich eine solche Gelegenheit entgehen zu lassen."
languages.original_text: "Of course, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. The dynasty needs income to maintain the protectorate. It would be foolish to pass up such an opportunity."

traits.locale_text: "Natürlich, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}. Die Dynastie braucht Einkünfte für den Erhalt des Protektorats. Es wäre dumm, sich eine solche Gelegenheit entgehen zu lassen."
"Natürlich, Lord Captain. Die Dynastie braucht Einkünfte für den Erhalt des Protektorats. Es wäre dumm, sich eine solche Gelegenheit entgehen zu lassen."

languages.text: "Elbette {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri. Hanedanlığın protektorayı sürdürmek için gelire ihtiyacı var. Böyle bir fırsatı kaçırmak aptallık olur."
languages.original_text: "Of course, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. The dynasty needs income to maintain the protectorate. It would be foolish to pass up such an opportunity."

traits.locale_text: "Elbette {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri. Hanedanlığın protektorayı sürdürmek için gelire ihtiyacı var. Böyle bir fırsatı kaçırmak aptallık olur."
"Elbette Lord Kaptan. Hanedanlığın protektorayı sürdürmek için gelire ihtiyacı var. Böyle bir fırsatı kaçırmak aptallık olur."

languages.text: « Bien sûr, Votre Seigneurie. La dynastie a besoin de ressources pour maintenir le protectorat. Il serait insensé de laisser passer une telle occasion. »
languages.original_text: "Of course, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. The dynasty needs income to maintain the protectorate. It would be foolish to pass up such an opportunity."

traits.locale_text: « Bien sûr, Votre Seigneurie. La dynastie a besoin de ressources pour maintenir le protectorat. Il serait insensé de laisser passer une telle occasion. »
« Bien sûr, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}. La dynastie a besoin de ressources pour maintenir le protectorat. Il serait insensé de laisser passer une telle occasion. »
